note: Fresh install catalog. Project bindings live in config/projects/<project>.json. Run ai-context-init to add local skills.

skills.name: ai-context
skills.description: Use when entering, installing, validating, or modifying ai-context, or when routing tasks through project/scene/rule/skill JSON indexes.
skills.trigger: Use when installing ai-context, checking configuration, routing a new task, updating indexes, or advancing G1-G7 task flow.
skills.whenToLoad: Load at the start of ai-context setup or when a task modifies this repository.

skills.name: ai-context-init
skills.description: Use after installing ai-context when the user needs first-time onboarding, personal AI preferences, project inventory, scene creation, skill/rule mounting, or migration from scattered notes into ai-context JSON.
skills.trigger: Use after install, first-time setup, onboarding, importing project inventory, creating profile, creating scenes, or turning messy notes into ai-context configuration.
skills.whenToLoad: Load after install or when initializing profile, projects, scenes, skills, and rules from user-provided notes.
